title: CarPlan Diesel Fuel Can, 5L
features: CarPlan Tetracan 5 litre capacity diesel can
Colour Coded Black for DIESEL for safe identification of fuels
In manufacture all cans undergo rigorous testing, to ensure the highest quality is met
Includes flexible pouring spout, sized to ensure there is no misfuelling
description: From the manufacturer Fuel Your Adventure with Carplan Jerry Can CarPlan offers everything needed to clean, valet, and care for your car, inside and out. CarPlan is a car care brand in the UK and has been manufacturing first-class car care products since the 1960s. Due to our experience, heritage, and market research we continually update and develop our car care products to meet changing customer and car enthusiast needs across the word. No more Misfueling The flexible pouring spout is sized to ensure there is no misfuelling. Making sure for you that Diesel is Diesel, and Petrol is Petrol. Suitable for your adventure Undergo rigorous testing. Throw it, drop it, toss it, no problem! Your fuel is all safe and sound. Different colours, for different fuel Green for unleaded petrol, Red for leaded petrol. Black for Diesel. Making sure for you that you won't mess up with which fuel you just filled.
